message:
chore: bump fsfs to v1.2.0; fix poll_immediate panic for async embedders

- Bump frankensearch-fsfs version 1.1.7 → 1.2.0
- Convert poll_immediate from panicking to returning Option<T> so
  genuinely async embedders degrade to EmbeddingFailed instead of
  crashing the shard future (fixes 3 federated timeout tests)
- cargo fmt on cass_compat.rs

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1,6 +1,6 @@
 [package]
 name = "frankensearch-fsfs"
-version = "1.1.7"
+version = "1.2.0"
 description = "Standalone fsfs CLI for two-tier hybrid local search"
 edition.workspace = true
 rust-version.workspace = true
